article_meta.title: War in UkraineKremlin says leaked U.S

reasoning: Classification (Center) is reasonable for a largely neutral news report with one notable authorial judgment ('appeared to favor Moscow heavily'). However, there is a formatting violation (markdown code fence) and one attribution-rule slip in key_indicators that cites an attributed Kremlin claim. Overall evidence and direction are mostly correct.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article reads as balanced multi-source reporting; Center is correct or at worst within one class.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.75 is a bit high for a mostly neutral piece with a few subtle lean signals; 0.6–0.7 would fit better.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Cites one strong author phrase correctly, but also uses an attributed Kremlin framing as a key_indicator (attribution violation).
